name: C2xGetStationSubAttributeInt64
title: C2xGetStationSubAttributeInt64
syntax: float C2xGetStationSubAttributeInt64(char[] attributeName, char[] subAttributeName); // form 1
float C2xGetStationSubAttributeInt64(char[] stationName, char[] attributeName, char[] subAttributeName); // form 2
description: This function returns the actual value of the integer-typed scenario sub-attribute. Form 1 of the function returns values of a sub-attribute of the calling (current) station. Form 2 allows to get values of all sub-attributes of any station in the scenario, even if the scenario station does not have an assigned database node.

parameters.name: attributeName
parameters.description: Name of the scenario attribute which belongs to the scenario station specified by stationName parameter

parameters.name: subAttributeName
parameters.description: Name of the scenario sub-attribute which belongs to the scenario station attribute specified by attributeName parameter

return: The integer value of the attribute at the time of function call.
availability: CANoe Measurement Setup / CANalyzer Analysis Branch
CANoe Test Setup for Test Modules
CANoe Test Setup for Test Units
